title: 我看过的页顶部 CTA 与模糊蒙层未统一跳转至尊会员开通页
rawInput:
飞书缺陷 ID: bug_fc5d5e45ddb6
飞书状态: 新增
优先级: P0
反馈日期: 2026-03-07
提报人: dylon
跟进人: ham, 刘瀚卿
父记录: 未填写
来源链接: https://gcncs1osaunb.feishu.cn/wiki/PlLrwARUNixHOXkpflxcPTi9nLh?table=tblSdvRVaxTpHlRY&view=vewLgt4u2h

问题描述:
我看过的：点击顶部“开通至尊会员”按钮，以及绿框蒙层模糊区域，统一跳转至会员开通页（选中至尊tab）；目前问题是前者错误出弹框，后者点击无反应

截图/附件:
- image.png -> /Users/firingj/Projects/immortal-in-laws-e2e/agent-memory/defect-reports/attachments/bug_fc5d5e45ddb6/image.png

phaseRuns.summary:
**Outcome**
- Wrote the triage artifact to `../immortal-in-laws-e2e/agent-memory/workflows/items/wf-2026-03-13T18-18-12-296Z-7jar0g/triage.md:1`; verdict is `ready`, `source_quality=high`, `next_action=generate_plan`.

**Findings**
- The bug is specific enough to plan: it targets `pages/message-record/index?type=view&direction=me_to_other`, entered from `pages/profile/index.ts:437`, and the intended destination already exists as `pages/member-center/index?tab=supreme` in `pages/message-record/index.ts:547` and `pages/member-center/index.ts:300`.
- The strongest technical signal is TS/JS drift: `pages/message-record/index.wxml:36` and `pages/message-record/index.wxml:60` bind both entry points to `onOpenSupremeVip`, but runtime `pages/message-record/index.js:253` still contains the old modal-based `onOpenVip` path and does not contain an `onOpenSupremeVip` implementation; `package.json:7` shows `.js` is generated by `tsc`.

**Actionable Fixes**
- The follow-up plan should first reconcile `pages/message-record/index.ts` with `pages/message-record/index.js`, then force both the top CTA and blurred overlay down the same direct `navigateTo('/pages/member-center/index?tab=supreme')` path, and finally regress with at least one non-member and one gold-member account.

**Changed Files**
- `../immortal-in-laws-e2e/agent-memory/workflows/items/wf-2026-03-13T18-18-12-296Z-7jar0g/triage.md:1`

**Commands Run**
- Ran `find`, `rg`, `sed`, `nl`, `stat`, `cat`, `git -C /Users/firingj/Projects/immortal-in-laws-e2e status --short -- agent-memory/workflows/items/wf-2026-03-13T18-18-12-296Z-7jar0g/triage.md`, `test -f ...`, and viewed the attached screenshot.

**Verification**
- Confirmed `triage.md` exists and starts with the required structure.
- No product code was edited, and no build/tests were run in this triage-only phase.

triage.normalizedTitle: 我看过的页顶部 CTA 与模糊蒙层未统一跳转至尊会员开通页
triage.summary: - 问题范围：`pages/message-record/index` 的“我看过的”视图，即 `type=view&direction=me_to_other`。从“我的”页功能入口可直接进入该路由：`pages/profile/index.ts:437`。
